Name: OpenStack Monitor
Author: Phantas Weng

Actions.Name: Instance Status
Actions.Tooltip: Show the running status of an OpenStack instance. Press to refresh; hold for 0.8s to open the Horizon detail page.

Actions.Name: Instance Usage
Actions.Tooltip: Show the resource usage metric of an OpenStack instance. Press to refresh; hold for 0.8s to open the Horizon detail page.

Actions.Name: Instance Power
Actions.Tooltip: Show the instance power state; press to run a power action (start/stop/reboot). Hold for 0.8s to open the Horizon detail page.

Description: Monitor and control OpenStack instances (status / resource usage / power).
